retry_reason: If the state is not found, retrying with the same parameters will not succeed unless the state is added externally; if the state is found but dying (refcount already zero), the object is gone permanently and retry is pointless.
contract_summary: Lookup-and-get wrapper: searches an xfrm_state hash table for a state matching the given parameters (family, spi, proto, daddr, mark). If found, increments the state's reference count via xfrm_state_hold_rcu and returns the state. The caller gains a reference and must later call xfrm_state_put() to release it. Returns NULL if no matching state exists or if the state is being destroyed. The caller must check the return value. The lookup is performed under RCU read-side protection, so the caller does not need to hold any lock.
